name: daxini-bca-learning
description: **A learning-first repository for 115 production-quality BCA projects across all levels.**

scripts.knowledge:check: node scripts/generate-knowledge-graph.js && node -e "const r=require('./knowledge-engine-report.json'); if(r.prerequisiteValidator.length||r.orphanTopics.length){console.error(JSON.stringify(r,null,2)); process.exit(1)} console.log('Knowledge graph checks passed')"
